# Chapter name <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span>

Examples of badges for use in other chapters:

- badge 1 <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span> # this one should be used by default.
- badge 2 <span class="badge badge-draft2">✎ Rough draft</span>
- badge 3 <span class="badge badge-draft3">✎ Polishing</span>
- badge 4 <span class="badge badge-complete">✓ Complete</span>

```{r}
#| include: false
# if it is available, run the setup script that tells quarto to round all df/tibble outputs to three decimal places
if(file.exists("../_setup.R")){source("../_setup.R")}
```

## Heading 1

Text

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title = "Check your learning: Question here"}
Answer here
:::

::: {.callout-tip title = "Practice writing functions"}
Link to other files like this (uncomment if file exists)
<!-- Ready to practice?  -->
<!-- Download and complete the [exercises for this chapter](../exercises/3_writing_functions_exercises.qmd). -->
:::
